title: Populate pitcher_game_logs and bullpen_context in the canonical 2026 MLB foundation
acceptance:
- API probe only: use requests to call MLB Stats API schedule+boxscore for 1 game_pk
- probe_result in result JSON contains at least 1 pitcher entry extracted from boxscore response
- game_pk used is documented in result JSON
- NO data files written (no parquet, no CSV, no script files created)
- NO imports beyond requests and standard library
- If SIGKILL occurs again: note it in result and stop — do not retry
